---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new workflow or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?
A clear description of the pain point or use case.

## Proposed Solution
How do you think this should work?

## Workflow Idea (if new workflow)
- **Trigger:** (webhook, schedule, email, etc.)
- **AI Task:** (classify, generate, summarize, etc.)
- **Output:** (Google Sheets, email, Slack, etc.)
- **Estimated cost per run:** 

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've tried or considered?

## Additional Context
Screenshots, links, or examples that help explain the request.
